v0.5.7: multi-representative cluster suggestions + deferred separation

- Rewrite suggest_person_link_clusters() to use multi-representative matching
  instead of a single centroid, fixing poor results for identities spanning
  wide appearance ranges (e.g. year 0 to year 4)

  representatives when a person has many clusters (up to 2000)

- Separate deferred clusters from suggested tab with Active/Deferred toggle
- Select all no longer includes deferred clusters
- Add diversity regression test for multi-cluster suggestions

Rewrite COPA PSYZON: iOS-inspired tournament management platform

Complete rewrite of all three files (index.html, style.css, script.js):

- Login system with Firebase Auth (admin/visitor modes)

- Champion celebration with confetti animation
- Toast notifications for user feedback
- localStorage persistence for tournament state
- XSS sanitization on all user input
- Fully responsive design (desktop + mobile)
- All text in Brazilian Portuguese

perf: major efficiency overhaul — eliminate wasted pre-flight calls

CLASSIFIER CHANGES:
- Strip email addresses (e.g. faktura@company.no) before keyword matching
  to prevent false invoice classification on supplier tasks
- Remove 'leverand'/'fornecedor' from invoice keywords (were triggering
  invoice pre-flight for pure supplier registration tasks)

  invoice/supplier task). Saves 1 call per credit note, simple invoice, supplier

  payroll|ledger only. Credit notes, invoices, suppliers no longer pay this cost.
  Saves 1 heavy GET call per invoice/credit note/supplier task.

- Supplier: -3 calls (was 3 pre-flight + 1 agent = 4; now 0 + 1 = 1)

- Travel: unchanged (payment_type + per_diem_zone = 2 pf)

PROMPT CHANGES:

  (was contradictory: 'omit unless required' vs hardcoded IDs section)

fix: prevent wheel scroll-down from resetting _userScrolledAway during streaming

Touchpad/precision-scroll devices fire interleaved up+down deltas in
the same gesture. Combined with the timing of programmatic ScrollToEnd,
a wheel-down event could arrive with distanceFromBottom=0 (because
ScrollToEnd just ran), immediately resetting _userScrolledAway=false
and undoing the user's scroll-up intent.

Remove the false-resetting path from OnUserWheelScroll entirely.

commit.message:
Add crash dump collection to all CI platforms (#1641)

Add crash/core dump collection to all CI platforms that run tests, so
crashes can be debugged post-mortem.

**Windows (win32.yml, nightly.yml):**
- WER minidumps configured via registry for Playground.exe and
UnitTests.exe
- Publishes minidump + exe/pdb on failure (~60-130 MB)
- Note: ASAN builds bypass WER; ASAN stderr provides equivalent
diagnostics

**Linux (linux.yml):**
- Core dumps enabled via `sysctl` core pattern + `ulimit -c unlimited`
- Publishes core dump + binary on failure (~110-180 MB)

**macOS (macos.yml):**
- Core dumps enabled via `sysctl` kern.corefile + `ulimit -c unlimited`
- Publishes core dump + binary on failure (~5 GB due to macOS virtual
memory mapping)

**Also:**
- Consistent step naming across all platforms ("Crash Dump" on Windows,
"Core Dump" on Linux/macOS)
- Nightly build now has crash dump collection (was previously missing)

perf: use FxHash for ~15% faster state space exploration (#36)

Replace DefaultHasher (SipHash) with FxHasher from rustc-hash for state
hashing and FxHashMap for state space storage. SipHash provides HashDoS
resistance unnecessary for u64 keys in an internal data structure.

rebuilding the entire BTreeMap entry by entry.

commit.message:
fix: use per-TFM minimum versions for Microsoft.Extensions.* packages

Previously all TFMs depended on 10.0.5, which forces net8/net9 consumers
to pull a package version incompatible with their framework — causing
unnecessary version conflicts.

Now each TFM pulls the matching minimum:
  net8.0  → Microsoft.Extensions.*  8.0.0
  net9.0  → Microsoft.Extensions.*  9.0.0
  net10/11 → Microsoft.Extensions.* 10.0.0

MongoDB.Driver uses a single minimum (3.0.0) across all TFMs since it is
not .NET-version-coupled. Consumers can freely upgrade within the 3.x range.
